**🗒️ Describe the task**
A clear and concise description of what the task is

**📌 Dependencies**
Any tasks this task may depend on

**🛠️ Ressources**
Links to anything helpful, such as documentation for a required tool

**✅ Definition of Done**
What needs to be done for this task to be considered complete
